activityLog.title: Activity Log
activityLog.description: A secure telemetry log record owned by an authenticated user.

userId.description: UID of the owner compiled from firebase authentications.

action.description: A succinct title describing the security or operational handshake event.

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the telemetry event was captured.

details.description: Verbose insights or context associated with the event.

origin.description: The specific client or edge server where this log originated.

apiKey.title: API Keys
apiKey.description: Fully interactive secure external cryptographic keys belonging to authenticated users.

userSetting.title: User Global Configuration
userSetting.description: Console global parameters customizable per member.

personalNote.title: Personal Note
personalNote.description: A private, customizable text note strictly owned and managed by the logged-in user.

userId.description: UID of the owner linked to Google Authentication.

content.description: The rich or plain-text body content of the note.

createdAt.description: When the note was first drafted.

updatedAt.description: When the note was last altered.

activity_logs/{logId}.description: Collection of telemetry operational activity logs tracked per authenticated developer user.

api_keys/{keyId}.description: Secure API Keys configured by the user.

user_settings/{userId}.description: Interactive settings document uniquely stored using the users' UID.

personal_notes/{noteId}.description: Strictly restricted notes collection where authenticated users edit and retrieve private workspace notes.
